name: Code Feature Implementation
description: Structured workflow for implementing a new code feature from requirements through validation and reporting

steps.title: Read project rules and conventions
steps.description: Load and review project-level rule files, coding standards, and conventions to follow during implementation
steps.expectedResult: Project rules and conventions reviewed and available for reference
acceptanceCriteria: Project rules files are read and key conventions identified

steps.title: Understand feature requirements
steps.description: Analyze the user prompt and identify key feature requirements, acceptance criteria, and expected behavior
steps.expectedResult: Feature requirements documented with clear acceptance criteria
acceptanceCriteria: Requirements are documented with acceptance criteria
steps.finalOutputContribution: Defines what the feature should do

steps.title: Inspect project structure and codebase
steps.description: Examine project structure, existing code patterns, dependencies, and relevant modules using CodeGraph if available
steps.expectedResult: Project structure understood with relevant files identified
acceptanceCriteria: Project structure and relevant files are documented
steps.finalOutputContribution: Identifies where changes need to be made

steps.title: Design solution approach
steps.description: Design the implementation approach, define types and interfaces, and identify specific files to create or modify
steps.expectedResult: Solution design documented with file list and implementation approach
acceptanceCriteria: Solution design has specific files and approach defined

steps.title: Implement code changes
steps.description: Write the implementation code following project conventions, types, and the solution design
steps.expectedResult: Implementation files created or modified correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Implementation files are created or modified

steps.title: Add tests for new feature
steps.description: Write unit tests and/or integration tests covering the new implementation
steps.expectedResult: Test files exist covering new implementation
acceptanceCriteria: Test files exist covering new implementation

steps.title: Run validation checks
steps.description: Execute type checking, linting, and tests to verify the implementation is correct
steps.expectedResult: Type check, lint, and tests all pass

steps.title: Generate final report
steps.description: Document what was implemented, what changed, validation results, and any remaining issues or next steps
acceptanceCriteria: Final report exists with implementation summary
